name: W-11 parallel-coordinator agent documents the fan-out decision algorithm covering budget check and lock grouping
command: grep -qi 'decision algorithm\|algorithm' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/parallel-coordinator.md" && grep -q 'lock_sections' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/parallel-coordinator.md" && grep -q 'estimated_tokens' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/parallel-coordinator.md" && echo documented 1>&2
